steps.title: Solve the unknown directly
steps.content: For a linear equation to have no solution, the $x$-coefficients must match while the constants differ. Matching the $x$-coefficients gives $k=-\frac{14}{15}$.

steps.title: Check the contradiction
steps.content: With this $k$, the $x$-terms cancel. The constants are $-2n$ and $-\frac{36}{19}$. Since $n\gt 1$, $2n\gt 2\gt \frac{36}{19}$, so the constants cannot be equal. That leaves a false statement, which is exactly the no-solution condition. The answer is -0.9333.
